summary: Created 4 tasks in BimodalLogic (291-294) and 12 tasks in cslib (2-13) for bimodal temporal logic integration

artifacts.summary: Task creation summary across both repos: 16 tasks created, dependency graph verified

completion_data.completion_summary: Created 16 tasks across two repos: 4 BimodalLogic preparation tasks (291-294) and 12 cslib porting/coordination tasks (2-13) for integrating bimodal temporal logic via 10 modular PRs. Dependency graph verified: toolchain upgrade (291) gates all porting; Syntax (2) gates all downstream PRs; sorry elimination (294) gates Theorems (5).

memory_candidates.content: Cross-repo task dependencies in multi-repo Lean 4 projects can be tracked using string keys in the dependencies array (e.g., "BimodalLogic:291") rather than plain integers, which avoids ambiguity when a cslib task depends on a BimodalLogic task number that might collide with cslib task numbers.

When porting Lean 4 code from BimodalLogic to cslib, the porting checklist is: (1) rename namespace Bimodal/Theories -> Cslib.Logics.Temporal, (2) add namespace declaration, (3) replace Mathlib imports with Cslib.Init, (4) add Apache 2.0 copyright header, (5) lake shake for unused imports, (6) set_option linter.all true, (7) lake build zero errors, (8) grep -r sorry confirms zero. The critical prerequisite is BimodalLogic task 291 (toolchain upgrade from v4.27 to v4.31).
